articles.title: For the 2nd time in weeks, Microsoft packages laced with credential stealer
articles.content: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.
articles.titleZh: 几周内第二次， Microsoft软件包带有凭据窃取程序
articles.contentZh: 73个包裹在AI代理打开后立即运行自我复制窃取程序。

articles.title: How a USB-connected speaker can infect a PC without ever being touched
articles.content: Seller of the Sound Blaster Katana V2X doesn't consider the behavior a vulnerability.
articles.titleZh: 连接USB的扬声器如何在不被触摸的情况下感染PC
articles.contentZh: Sound Blaster Katana V2X的卖家不认为该行为是漏洞。

articles.title: Dashlane explains how attackers managed to download encrypted password vaults
articles.content: By targeting large numbers of users, attackers increased their chances of success.
articles.titleZh: Dashlane解释了攻击者如何设法下载加密密码保管库
articles.contentZh: 通过瞄准大量用户，攻击者增加了他们成功的机会。

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.content: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.
articles.titleZh: 无法理解Dashlane的保管库盗窃通知？你并不孤单。
articles.contentZh: 安全警告漏掉了关键细节。Dashlane保持完全安静。

articles.title: Hue’s SpatialAware finally made me appreciate color-changing lights
articles.content: I've been a fan of Philips Hue smart lights since the early days. It's one of the few staples in my ever-changing smart home. However, when the Bridge Pro launched late last year, it wasn't immediately obvious why I should upgrade. The signature feature, MotionAware - which turns your lights into motion sensors - is […]
articles.titleZh: Hue的SpatialAware终于让我欣赏到变色灯
articles.contentZh: 从早期开始，我就一直是飞利浦Hue智能灯的粉丝。它是我千变万化的智能家居中为数不多的主食之一。但是，当Bridge Pro去年年底推出时，我为什么要升级并不是立即显而易见的。将灯光转化为运动传感器的标志性功能MotionAware是[…]

articles.title: Amazon employees ask Seattle to put the brakes on new data centers
articles.content: On Tuesday, the Seattle City Council will vote on whether to enact a one-year moratorium on new data centers - just two months after several companies proposed building five large-scale centers in the city. Among the moratorium's fiercest supporters are current employees from the city's biggest tech giant, Amazon, who joined others to testify in […]
articles.titleZh: 亚马逊员工要求西雅图遏制新数据中心
articles.contentZh: 周二，西雅图市议会将就是否暂停新数据中心进行投票--就在几个公司提议在该市建造五个大型中心的两个月后。暂停令最强烈的支持者是该市最大的科技巨头亚马逊的现任员工，他们与其他人一起在[…]作证。
